boundaries.reason: The 0.28.1 chart introduced blockNode.persistence.plugins; --reuse-values from 0.28.0 fails with a nil pointer error. StatefulSet must be recreated with fresh values.
The 0.32.0 chart moved metrics from blockNode.health.metrics to blockNode.metrics; --reuse-values from 0.31.x can miss required keys and fail template rendering.
The 0.37.0 chart adds blockNode.persistence.applicationState and changes StatefulSet volumeClaimTemplates, which are immutable and require recreating the StatefulSet.
